'''faposo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nymphomanic|nymphomanic]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-p-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nymphomanic|nymphomanic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| faposo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || fæpeseth || fæpesej || fæpesesh || fæpese
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || fapoposoth || fapoposoj || fapopososh || fapoposo
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || faposoth || faposoj || fapososh || faposo
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || fapofsofth || fapofsofj || fapofsofsh || fapofsof
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || faposotho || faposojo || fapososho || faposoko
|-
| [[Patient]] || faposoth || faposoj || fapososh || faposo
|-
| [[Possessive]] || faposothol || faposojol || fapososhol || faposokol
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || faposoothotho || faposoojojo || faposooshosho || faposooko
|-
| [[Dative]] || faposothon || faposojon || fapososhon || faposokon
|-
| [[Speaker]] || faposothooro || faposojooro || fapososhooro || faposokooro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
